ul.li:
Include these codes as defined in https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
CodeDisplay
EmCare.B14S2.DE19Skin Lesions ≥ 4 cm
EmCare.B14S2.DE20Red Skin Streaks
EmCare.B14S2.DE21Tender Nodes (Nodules) under the skin
EmCare.B14S2.DE22Skin Infection extends to Muscle
EmCare.B14S2.DE23Molluscum Contagiosum - Skin coloured pearly white papules with central umbilication. Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children.
EmCare.B14S2.DE24Warts - Papules or nodules with a rough (Verrucous) surface
EmCare.B14S2.DE25Seborrhea - Greasy scales and redness on central face and body folds
EmCare.B14S2.DE26Fixed Drug Reactions - Generalised red, wide spread with small bumps or blisters; or one or more dark skin areas
EmCare.B14S2.DE27Eczema - Wet oozing sores or excoriated, thick patches
EmCare.B14S2.DE28Steven Johnson Syndrome - Severe reaction due to cotrimoxazole or NVP involving the skin as well as the eyes and the mouth. Might cause difficulty in breathing

title.value: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth

description.value: Codes representing possible values for the Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth element

value.value: The client has Skin Lesions ≥ 4 cm
The client has red skin streaks
The client has tender nodes (nodules) under the skin that can appear on any part of the face or body
The client has skin infection that extends to muscle

display.value: Molluscum Contagiosum - Skin coloured pearly white papules with central umbilication. Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children.

value.value: The client has Molluscum Contagiosum - Skin coloured pearly white papules with central umbilication. Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children.

display.value: Warts - Papules or nodules with a rough (Verrucous) surface

value.value: The client has Warts - Papules or nodules with a rough (Verrucous) surface

display.value: Seborrhea - Greasy scales and redness on central face and body folds

value.value: The client has Seborrhea - Greasy scales and redness on central face and body folds

display.value: Fixed Drug Reactions - Generalised red, wide spread with small bumps or blisters; or one or more dark skin areas

value.value: The client has Fixed Drug Reactions - Generalised red, wide spread with small bumps or blisters; or one or more dark skin areas

display.value: Eczema - Wet oozing sores or excoriated, thick patches

value.value: The client has Eczema - Wet oozing sores or excoriated, thick patches

display.value: Steven Johnson Syndrome - Severe reaction due to cotrimoxazole or NVP involving the skin as well as the eyes and the mouth. Might cause difficulty in breathing

value.value: The client has Steven Johnson Syndrome - Severe reaction due to cotrimoxazole or NVP involving the skin as well as the eyes and the mouth. Might cause difficulty in breathing
